case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. JUNE LEIATAUA

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEIATAUA, JUNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $115) SERVED OCT-28-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEIATAUA, JUNE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED**

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-15-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO COURT ON 12-12-2022 FOR A PAYMENT PLAN TO THE PLAINTIFF. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED AT 3-MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL THE RESOLVE DATE OF MARCH 2024, AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JUN-15-2023 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) STEVEN ADELSON, SR. COLLECTIONS OFFICER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-13-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY STEVEN ADELSON, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. DEFENDANT JUNE LEIATAUA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEIATAUA, JUNE
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED OCT-28-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEIATAUA, JUNE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-15-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVEN ALDELSON, SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. DEFENDANT JUNE LEIATAUA IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO COURT FOR A PAYMENT PLAN TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MAR-15-2023 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED AT 3-MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL THE RESOLVE DATE OF MARCH 2024, AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-13-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVEN ADELSON, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. DEFENDANT JUNE LEIATUAUA IS PRESENT. SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BROKE APART. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS A 3 MONTH CONTINUANCE. PARTIES ARE CURRENTLY RENEGOTIATING THE TERMS OF THEIR SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLIVA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEIATAUA, JUNE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
